title: OmniProject canonical field
description: One work-item field in the canonical vocabulary. The fields are authored as a single JSON array (assets/fields.json), validated element-by-element against this schema and embedded by gen-fields.

core.description: Always present on any issue-tracking backend (never gated off).

required.description: Must be provided when creating the owning entity.

references.description: For type: reference — the entity key this field points at (e.g. programme).

entity.description: The canonical entity (table) this field belongs to. Defaults to 'issue' when omitted. Drives which table a field becomes a column on in the superset-native self-host DB schema generator.
